scripts.postinstall: python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.start: cd backend && ../.venv/bin/python manage.py collectstatic --noinput && ../.venv/bin/python manage.py migrate --noinput && ../.venv/bin/python manage.py import_static_products --if-empty && ../.venv/bin/python -m gunicorn cosmobeads_backend.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-8000}
